meaning: vt.浣挎敼瀹梫i.鍔濊鏀瑰畻
examples: I assured him we didn't come here to proselytize.
I now take the view that religion is harmless so long as it does not compel its members to proselytize.
A wise man will not proselytize you.
We need a new information layer to proselytize this form of investment and get people comfortable with it.
White House officials say safeguards would be in place to make sure the religious groups do not use the money to proselytize.
